topic.title: Configuring network devices to accept traffic from all MAC addresses

body.p: Network devices usually intercept and read packets that their controller is programmed to receive. You can configure the network devices to accept traffic from all MAC addresses in a virtual switch or at the port group level.
You can use this network mode to:

li.p: Monitor network activity for security reasons
Intercept private data-in-transit or intrusion in the network

body.p: You can enable this mode for any kind of network device, except InfiniBand.
